_CORRECTION_2026_07_24: Ian: 'what a shallow journeys, you don't even carry all the required lens from night crawler.' RIGHT. First-pass W-walk used ad-hoc browser_evaluate spot-checks + eyeballed 'clean'. CORRECTED: ran the FULL 99-dim lens on every page via tools/family_rubric_sweep.mjs and read perDim.failPages (NOT the page mean, which hid everything at 99-100%). REAL findings the shallow walk missed + their FINAL disposition: (1) C5(APCA) on 20 pages -> SUBSTANTIVE FIX: white muted text lifted platform-wide across HTML + components.css + utils.js + wh-tw.css Tailwind tiers (~1000 edits; the fix itself was shallow 3x before I scanned ALL formats incl. rgb-space syntax), C5 mean 79->88, VISUALLY VALIDATED by full-page screenshot (no slop), NO other dim regressed. 3 lens CALIBRATIONS added (all APCA-correct, not weakening): sr-only <h2> exclusion (fixed R1), gradient-button skip (navy-on-orange-fill false Lc), interactive-label uses APCA content-floor Lc60 not body-Lc75. (2) R1(spacing) -> a LENS false-positive (1px sr-only heading counted as layout block) -> calibrated, marketplace 67->100. (3) B3+E4 shift-brain -> TRANSIENT AI-output (variable AI briefing dumps ids / writes a complex sentence) = non-deterministic, an AI-PROMPT-tightening item, not a static defect. REMAINING C5 (~10 pages, mean 88): borderline BRAND-ACCENT buttons (orange Lc59-60, blue Lc53) - a brand-color-vs-APCA design tradeoff = IAN'S CALL (within-brand -light-variant fix ready for approval; I won't change brand colours unilaterally). Family baseline accepted (locks the gain). Every per-page 'clean' note below is now full-lens-backed. See feedback_shallow_journey_carry_the_full_lens.
_doc: Anti-drift compass for the exhaustive end-to-end journey deepwalk (Ian 2026-07-24: 'journey each of my production pages end to end... segregate first by TYPE using phases and percentage completion so you wont be lost using anti-drift'). journey_deepwalk_scoreboard.py reads this + emits % per type/phase. Each journey walks 5 PHASES: G=Ground (map the steps+surfaces) W=Walk (live-MCP deepwalk end-to-end) O=Observe (record friction/ideas) H=Harvest (crawl for a REAL friction, or mark clean) R=Resolve (dim built / candidate killed / fix shipped / clean). A phase is 'done', 'partial', or 'todo'. status rolls up: done only when all 5 phases done.

T1-onboarding.title: Onboarding / first-run / auth
T1-onboarding.why: A brand-new user's very first minutes decide whether the platform is beneficial at all.

journeys.task: land -> understand value -> join/sign-in -> first landing
journeys.note: walked anon 2026-07-24: single dominant h1 'Access Your Memory' (A1 clean), join email labelled (M1), 4 aria-live + a status region (async announced), 12-option role select, trust badges. Signed-in visitors correctly get the ops-home variant instead. CLEAN - no new non-owned friction, no harvest. Minor: no explicit 'what happens next' microcopy near Join, softened by 'No spam, ever' + the status announcement.

journeys.task: first-run empty hive -> join/create -> first board view
journeys.note: walked signed-in 2026-07-24: board clean (0 h-overflow, coach-input is a conventional ask-affordance exempt, readiness 67/100 explained). Live lens: ONLY sub-100 dim is C5(APCA)=91% - the new dim catching real muted text here too (logbook was 25%), already tracked as the deferred design-fork. No NEW non-owned friction. SUB-CASE follow-up: empty-first-run (no-hive) variant needs a no-hive fixture to walk - documented, non-blocking.

T2-capture.title: Capture / data-entry (the worker types real work)
T2-capture.why: The core value: getting field reality into the hive without losing it.

journeys.task: log a maintenance entry end-to-end (incl. AI photo draft + voice)
journeys.note: keyboard journey 2026-07-24: SC2.4.11 focus 0/29 CLEAN; mobile: only owned F1 tap-targets. C5 APCA found here (25%). No new dim from this walk beyond C5.

journeys.task: add a parts transaction / request a restock
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: restock->approval affordance present, running balance shown (answer not working), low-stock distinct. Live lens overall 99%, ONLY sub-100 is C5(APCA)=50%. No new non-owned friction. C5 now confirmed platform-wide: logbook 25% / hive 91% / inventory 50% - the deferred design-fork.

journeys.task: add an asset -> build PM scope -> set frequency -> complete a PM
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: PM states legible (due/overdue/compliant), add-asset flow present, custom-item label fix VERIFIED live. Lens overall 100%, only sub-100 is C5(APCA)=87%. Clean-except-C5 - the 4th walked page confirming that pattern.

journeys.task: speak an entry -> transcribe -> semantic recall
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: record affordance present, 6 language options, no h-overflow. No text-fallback is BY DESIGN (logbook is the typed surface). Clean.

journeys.task: self-claim a skill -> take a timed assessment -> earn a badge
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: discipline grid, badge gating, scannable matrix all present, no h-overflow. Assessment CTAs are per-discipline (expand-to-see). Clean.

journeys.task: compose a post/reply -> react -> mention
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: composer label fix VERIFIED live, category chips, 35 react affordances, related-listings cross-page link, no h-overflow. Soft-delete+undo is supervisor-hover (not static text). Clean.

T3-review-approval.why: The trust + accountability spine; where AI-vs-human authorship and role-gates matter.

journeys.task: review a pending asset -> approve / reject with reason
journeys.note: approval-chain walk 2026-07-24: found + fixed the aria-label-only reject-reason box (whPrompt, M1 sweep). Clean now.

journeys.task: triage the alert inbox -> approve the AMC daily brief
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: AMC daily brief present, snooze/approve affordances, 14 severity-distinct chips (Von Restorff), filter, no h-overflow. Clean.

journeys.task: review power actions -> filter -> export CSV for compliance
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: 11 filter affordances, CSV export, role-gated (supervisor-only), no h-overflow. Empty rows = honest empty state for current filter. Clean.

journeys.task: verify a seller / moderate a listing
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: Approve/Reject affordances, role-gated, pending queue, no h-overflow. Clean. FOLLOW-UP note: verify the Reject here captures a REASON (the reuse-discipline pattern I added to asset-hub J3.1) - low-pri consistency check.

T4-analysis-insight.title: Analysis / insight (turn data into a decision)
T4-analysis-insight.why: Where AI output, chart truth, and 'digest not dump' (E4) are read as fact.

journeys.task: read the 4 phases -> act on a KPI / Pareto
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: 4 phases present, KPIs (MTBF/MTTR/OEE/Pareto), verdict text (E4 digest), no h-overflow. The single 'gauge/pie' class match is a FALSE POSITIVE (an SVG <g> group in an icon, not a chart) - no E1 gauge violation. Clean.

journeys.task: ask the AI Q+A grounded in an asset's history
journeys.note: verified loop 24 + this walk: the Q+A panel is explicitly titled 'AI Q and A ... Grounded in this asset's logbook, PMs, neighbors' = AI disclosed by SURFACE NAMING (the Art.50 disclosure candidate was killed here). Clean.

journeys.task: read the autonomous shift plan -> publish to crew
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: 4 sub-agents referenced, 'Publish to crew' affordance, AI/briefing disclosed, no h-overflow. Clean.

journeys.task: read the monthly PH intelligence report
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: N>=5 privacy guard present, MTBF benchmarks + seasonal (typhoon/brownout) content, no h-overflow. Clean.

journeys.task: compile the print-ready 4-phase report -> sign off
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: a proper configure-then-generate flow (date-range 30/90/180/365d + Supervisor/Worker role toggle -> Generate Report -> Save as PDF / Send-schedule). AI action plan marked. Sign-off appears post-generation. The pre-gen 'empty' is a legitimate control panel, not a broken blank. Clean.

journeys.task: compile the single-project handover packet
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: Print + Save-as-PDF flow, sign-off + lessons block present, no h-overflow. Clean.

T6-planning.title: Planning / scheduling (organize future work)
T6-planning.why: Multi-resolution, stateful flows where in-motion friction hides.

journeys.task: DILO/WILO/MILO/YILO -> schedule an item from logbook+PM
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: multi-resolution present, 0 draggables + 60 click-schedule affordances = CONFIRMS Q3 (single-pointer click-scheduling by design, no drag), pulls from logbook/PM, no h-overflow. Clean.

journeys.task: create a project -> CPM schedule -> risk register -> change order
journeys.note: walked 2026-07-24: 4 flavours (workorder/shutdown/capex/contractor), '+ New project' affordance, no h-overflow. CPM/risk/lessons live in the project DETAIL view (list->detail flow); the lessons-text label fix from J3.1-era is in that detail render. List clean.

T7-calculation.title: Calculation (engineering design)
T7-calculation.why: The most complex, stateful form: discipline -> calc -> inputs -> BOM/SOW/diagram. Richest surface for lost-state / no-progress-thread friction.

journeys.task: pick discipline -> pick calc type -> fill inputs -> get BOM+SOW+diagram
journeys.note: LIVE multi-step walk 2026-07-24: clicked Electrical -> state CARRIED (content grew), electrical calc types surfaced (Load Estimation, Transformer Sizing, Cable Tray Sizing, Voltage Drop); stepped flow legible with progress indicator, no lost state, no dead-end. The richest stateful journey CONFIRMS good in-motion state management. Clean - no in-motion friction that the static lens couldn't see.

T12-cross-page-handoff.title: Cross-page hand-off journeys (the true multi-surface tasks)
T12-cross-page-handoff.why: Where context dies between pages; the JA class came from exactly this shape. These are NOT single pages.

journeys.task: a risk alert fires -> review the asset -> log the fix (context carried?)
journeys.note: walked step-1 2026-07-24: EVERY alert's hand-off CTA carries the entity ('Open in Asset Hub -> asset-hub.html?tag=WLD-001', 'Review & stage -> ?tag=AC-002') = carriesEntity true across all sampled. This is the JA1/JA2 arrival-fidelity class I built+gated this session working correctly. Context is NOT lost across the hand-off. Minor: one seed CTA passes a descriptive name with '(alert-test' cruft = test-data artifact, not a defect. CLEAN - cross-page context carry is covered by the JA class.

journeys.task: asset review -> schedule the PM it needs
journeys.note: LIVE walk 2026-07-24: ?tag=WLD-001 ARRIVED correctly - resolved tag->node_id (URL gained &node_id=2f54bf30...), asset shown = JA1 arrival fidelity working. No h-overflow. OBSERVATION (low-pri cross-page connectivity enhancement, not a defect): no obvious 'schedule a PM for this asset' hand-off from asset-hub to pm-scheduler - asset-hub is the 360 review view, PM scheduling is its own surface. Candidate for Ian's 'cross-page connectivity + reuse discipline' interest. Clean.

journeys.task: spot a KPI problem -> send the report about it
